en: This was such a good idea getting Catwoman a cat.
ko: 캣우먼한테 고양이 선물하는 거 진짜 좋은 아이디어였어.

en: Yeah, that's a perfect gift classic.
It's like classic truly classic
Oh cute cat Zoe's here to see you.
Oh, yeah center on in. Hey Zoe there.
I'm ready for you. Okay, great. Thanks
ko: 아 그래 들어와. 안녕 Zoe. 준비됐어. 좋아, 고마워

en: Hey guys What we lost the cat
Shut it, shut it, close it!
Close the door!
Did anything small and cat like run by your legs out the door?
ko: 작고 고양이처럼 생긴 게 네 다리 사이로 문밖으로 뛰어나간 거 없어?

en: Wait what?
Is that all you can say? Help us find your gift!
Why did you buy me a cat?
ko: 선물 찾는 거 좀 도와줘! 왜 나한테 고양이를 산 거야?

en: We thought it would be funny to get Catwoman a woman cat.
ko: 캣우먼한테 암컷 고양이 선물하면 웃길 줄 알았어.

en: It's classic It's like our thing, okay?
We got Ant-Man a man ant So come on, help us look!
ko: 앤트맨한테는 수컷 개미 선물했잖아. 그러니까 좀 도와줘!

en: Wait stop, no stop. This is insane.
What's the big deal? You don't understand
ko: 이건 미친 짓이야. 뭐가 그렇게 큰일이야? 너희가 이해를 못 해

en: The cat's name is Snugglebucket and it looks like this Oh my god
ko: 고양이 이름이 Snugglebucket이고 이렇게 생겼거든. 세상에

en: Let's find this cat It's not under there I got him!
I got him!
No, that's Ben. It's okay.
Just keep looking Why did we ask for the smallest and fastest cat they had?
ko: 괜찮아. 계속 찾아. 왜 우리가 제일 작고 빠른 고양이를 달라고 한 거야?

en: Ben is it in your desk?
No, it's just a stupid dog Oh!
Oh my god John check the shelf Checking the shelf!
ko: 세상에 John 선반 확인해! 선반 확인 중!

en: It's not on the shelf Oh my god, I found her Yay!
Thank god Little sweetie must have been so scared But the good thing is we found her
ko: 다행이다. 이 작은 꼬마가 엄청 무서웠을 텐데. 그래도 찾은 게 다행이야

en: Wait, where did the cat go?
Oh my god Come on, come on
Anything under the couch, Mark?
Just some crumbs, a coin, and a man Hey guys
ko: 부스러기, 동전, 그리고 사람 한 명. 안녕 얘들아

en: Paul Dato?
Paul, what are you doing here?
Gosh, I'm sorry. I've been living down there.
I'm researching a new movie I'm doing It's about three guys who suck
ko: 거기서 살고 있었어. 새 영화 리서치 중이거든. 별 볼일 없는 세 남자 이야기야

en: Come on, man Three guys Dude, it's just so crazy, man
ko: 야, 이 사람아. 세 남자라고? 진짜 미친 거 아니야

en: The cat!
Was I petting it?
I'm checking our stash.
I don't see it John, behind you!
I got him!
Me again Guys, this is insane, okay?
ko: 또 나야. 얘들아, 이건 미친 짓이야, 알겠지?

en: We're not gonna find the Oh my god It's horrible
ko: 우린 절대 못 찾을... 세상에. 끔찍해

en: No, no My Lego set You were so hard on me
ko: 안 돼, 안 돼. 내 레고 세트. 힘들게 만든 건데

ko: 야 얘들아, 고양이 찾았어! 야호! 좋아, 선물은 잘 받았지

en: We'll see you later That's it?
Yeah.
Paul, you should probably head out too, man Alright, see ya
ko: 응. Paul, 너도 이제 가는 게 좋겠다. 알겠어, 잘 가

en: No, no, no, not, not, don't Goodnight, guys Bye, guys
ko: 안 돼, 안 돼, 하지 마. 잘 자, 얘들아. 안녕, 얘들아

en: What a crazy adventure we had Hey, I'm gonna miss that crazy cat And I'll miss you, dudes
ko: 정말 미친 모험이었어. 야, 그 미친 고양이가 보고 싶을 거야. 나도 너희가 보고 싶을 거야

en: Let's go!
